scripts.ar:sync:typecheck: tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --moduleResolution bundler --module preserve --target ES2022 --types node scripts/sync-interventions.ts scripts/validate-content-sync.ts src/lib/ar/content-sync.ts
scripts.ar:sync:validate: bun run ar:sync:typecheck && bun scripts/validate-content-sync.ts && bun scripts/sync-interventions.ts validate
scripts.build: bun run schema:local && EMDASH_DATABASE_URL=file:./data.db astro build
scripts.typecheck: bun run schema:local && EMDASH_DATABASE_URL=file:./data.db astro check
